# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
  - api1.example.com
  - api2.example.com
  addresses: 
  - "192.0.2.0" # CIDR notation
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https-port
      protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
    - api1.example.com
    - api2.example.com
  gateways:
  - istio-egressgateway
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
        - "*.example.com"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api1.example.com
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.external.net
  addresses: 
  - "203.0.113.1" # IP address
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: pgsql-port
      protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.external.net
  gateways:
  - istio-egressgateway
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
      sniHosts:
        - "*.example.com"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: db.external.net
